theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat — Mint Pastel Palette (user-provided strip)

Exact hex from reference strip (left → right):
1. Soft coral #f9a79b
2. Light peach #fbcab9  ← companion LEFT of center
3. Pale mint #d9eedb   ← CENTER / brand core
4. Light aqua #9ce5de  ← companion RIGHT of center
5. Deep teal #05aba9   ← CTA / interactive (AA contrast)

## Role mapping
- Brand soft / selected / KPI accents / soft badges: #d9eedb (center mint)
- Warm companion (zebra tint, secondary soft panels, warm chips): #fbcab9
- Cool companion (secondary buttons, borders accent, tags): #9ce5de
- Primary CTA, links, active nav bar, focus ring: #05aba9 (deep teal from same strip)
- CTA hover: darken teal ≈ #048f8d
- Optional warm accent for soft coral status open: #f9a79b

## Surfaces
- surface.base: #f4faf6 (mint-tinted canvas)
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #d5e8e0

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #5f6b66

## Status
- open: #05aba9 (or soft fill #d9eedb + text #048f8d)
- evaluating: use warm peach text on soft #fbcab9
- won: #05aba9 / mint family
- lost: keep semantic red #dc2626
- expiring: soft coral #f9a79b border/text
- inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
Flat Institutional. No blue, no purple, no coral-as-primary CTA.
Center the UI around mint #d9eedb with peach + aqua companions.
CTAs must use deep teal #05aba9 for white text contrast.
1px borders, no skeuomorphism.

register.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/d7fdcc5e81df4405b53cbfdd60815701
register.prompt:
Create a registration screen with a split layout. 
LEFT PANEL (~42% width, background #d9eedb):
- Top: Official logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}} (black circuit rocket) sized ~128px.
- Below logo: Wordmark 'Leadiva' in a bold, professional font.
- Subtitle: 'Inteligencia comercial para Creativa Studios'.
- Bottom Footer: 'Acceso interno · Creativa Studios'.
- Style: No decorative circles, flat, no gradients.

RIGHT PANEL (white background, center-aligned form max 400px):
- Title: 'Crear cuenta'.
- Subtitle: 'Acceso interno para el equipo de Creativa Studios'.
- Fields: 
  - Row 1: 'Nombres', 'Apellidos' (two columns).
  - Row 2: 'Correo electrónico'.
  - Row 3: 'Contraseña'.
  - Row 4: 'Confirmar contraseña'.
- Checkbox: 'Mostrar contraseña'.
- Button: Full-width CTA 'Crear cuenta' with background #05aba9 and white text.
- Link: '¿Ya tienes cuenta? Inicia sesión'.
- Helper text at bottom: 'SOLO DOMINIOS AUTORIZADOS'.

General Style: 
- Borders: #d5e8e0.
- Text: Primary #1c1917, Secondary #5f6b66.
- Font: IBM Plex Sans.
- No gradients, glass, or shadows. Flat Institutional style.
register.title: /register — Crear cuenta

home.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/825ea0a6696348f9b0e28821de1eb6a2
home.prompt:
Authenticated home dashboard at path '/'.
Title: / — Inicio
Language: Spanish (Español).
Style: Flat Institutional, Leadiva Mint Pastel.
Background: #f4faf6.
Components:
- SideNavBar: Use official rocket logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_8}} (black/near-black) and Leadiva wordmark. Navigation: 'Inicio' (active state), 'Oportunidades'.
- Main Content Header: Greeting '¡Buenos días, [Nombre]!' and a short sentence summarizing the pipeline status.
- KPI Row (4 cards):
    1. 'Oportunidades activas': Large number, mint accent (#d9eedb background for icon/tag).
    2. 'Por verificar': Large number, peach accent (#fbcab9 background for icon/tag).
    3. 'Próximas a vencer': Large number, mint accent.
    4. 'Score promedio': Rating or percentage, peach accent.
- Table Section: 'Próximas fechas límite'. Compact, clean table with columns: Título, Organización, Estado (Status badges), Deadline.
- CTA: Primary button 'Ver oportunidades' using teal (#05aba9).
Design Rules: White cards, borders #d5e8e0, flat UI, no gradients, no shadows, no skeuomorphism. Dense but readable.
## Available Images
You MUST include the following images in this design. You must reference them
by putting their exact placeholder IDs in `src` attributes or CSS
`background-image` rules. Do NOT use external URLs or generate new
placeholders. Preserve these IDs exactly as written. Read each image's
Description to understand its subject, intended section, and visual role.

- {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_8}}
  Description: Leadiva Logo Official
  Dimensions: 1024x1024
  Aspect Ratio: 1.00
home.title: / — Inicio

oportunidades.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/2c7bb73feb7c428b8498158b637e8d46
oportunidades.prompt:
Create the Leadiva Oportunidades list screen (/oportunidades) in Spanish. 

Design System Context:
- Style: Flat Institutional, Leadiva Mint Pastel.
- Background: #f4faf6 canvas.
- Panels: White with #d5e8e0 borders.
- Accent: #05aba9.
- Constraints: No gradients, no shadows, no glassmorphism.

Sidebar:
- Use official logo {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_11}}.
- Navigation: 'Inicio' and 'Oportunidades' (Active).

Content:
- Title: "Oportunidades".
- Subtitle: "Catálogo de oportunidades comerciales detectadas y verificadas".
- Filters Bar: Search input, dropdowns for 'Estado', 'Fuente', 'Plazo'. Buttons: 'Filtrar' (Primary subtle), 'Limpiar' (Secondary).
- Primary CTA (top right or in bar): "Actualizar búsqueda".
- Data Table (Dense): 
    - Columns: Título, Organización, Fuente, Estado, Score, Deadline.
    - Status badges (mint/peach/aqua flat).
    - Rows should look clickable.
    - Sample data (institutional/business style):
        1. "Modernización Red Ferroviaria", "Ministerio de Transporte", "Licitación", "Abierta", "92", "20 Dic 2024"
        2. "Suministro Hardware Educativo", "Sena", "Directo", "En Evaluación", "78", "15 Ene 2025"
        3. "Servicios Cloud", "Banca Nacional", "Referido", "Ganada", "95", "Concluido"
        4. "Consultoría Eficiencia Energética", "Ecopetrol", "Licitación", "Por Vencer", "64", "Mañana"

Title: "/oportunidades — Lista"
## Available Images
You MUST include the following images in this design. You must reference them
by putting their exact placeholder IDs in `src` attributes or CSS
`background-image` rules. Do NOT use external URLs or generate new
placeholders. Preserve these IDs exactly as written. Read each image's
Description to understand its subject, intended section, and visual role.

- {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_11}}
  Description: Leadiva Logo Official
  Dimensions: 1024x1024
  Aspect Ratio: 1.00
oportunidades.title: /oportunidades — Lista

detalle.name: projects/929484233158471895/screens/ad1d3f4910ae41c5bd76bdf4f6bd75d4
detalle.prompt:
Create a high-fidelity opportunity detail screen for Leadiva in Spanish. 
Route: /oportunidades/[resultado].
Design System: Leadiva Mint Pastel (Primary #05aba9, BG #f4faf6). 
Logo: Use {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_13}} (Leadiva Logo Official) in the sidebar.
Style: Flat Institutional. No shadows, no gradients, no glassmorphism. Clean borders and flat panels.

Layout & Content:
1. SideNav: Tabs for 'Inicio' and 'Oportunidades'. Sidebar should have the logo and 'Leadiva' branding.
2. Breadcrumbs: 'Oportunidades / Detalle del resultado'.
3. Header Section:
   - Title: 'Modernización del Sistema de Gestión de Residuos - Alcaldía de San Salvador'
   - Subtitle: 'Alcaldía Municipal de San Salvador, El Salvador'
   - Status Badge: 'ABIERTA' (Teal/Mint style)
   - Score: '92/100' (High compatibility)
4. Action Bar (Top Right):
   - Button 'Verificar' (Outline)
   - Button 'Descartar' (Outline, subtle)
   - Button 'Convertir a lead' (Primary solid #05aba9)
5. Main Grid (3/4 width):
   - Summary Card: Description of the tender, services requested (software implementation, hardware supply), and key requirements (ISO certification, 5+ years experience).
   - Metadata Card: Source (COMPRASAL), Country (El Salvador), Publication Date (12 Oct 2023), Deadline (15 Nov 2023), Source URL (external link icon).
   - AI Compatibility: Explanation of the 92 score (Match with Creativa Studios expertise in gov-tech and scaling).
   - Verification Status: 'Pendiente de validación técnica'.
6. Sidebar/Secondary Column (1/4 width):
   - Timeline/Activity: 'Detectado por IA (Hace 2h)', 'Verificación automática completada', 'Asignado para revisión manual'.

Title the screen: /oportunidades/[resultado] — Detalle
## Available Images
You MUST include the following images in this design. You must reference them
by putting their exact placeholder IDs in `src` attributes or CSS
`background-image` rules. Do NOT use external URLs or generate new
placeholders. Preserve these IDs exactly as written. Read each image's
Description to understand its subject, intended section, and visual role.

- {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_13}}
  Description: Leadiva Logo Official
  Dimensions: 1024x1024
  Aspect Ratio: 1.00
detalle.title: /oportunidades/[resultado] — Detalle
